target_rationale: Pectin methylesterase inhibitors regulate extracellular pectin remodeling
Pectin methylesterases modify cell-wall pectin and can affect pathogen colonization
Xyloglucan endotransglucosylase hydrolases remodel cell-wall xyloglucan
Expansins loosen plant cell walls and are secreted cell-wall proteins
Class III peroxidases are secreted and connect ROS handling with lignin and wound responses
